Seasonal Lab Reading the solar terms in city life

Seasonal Lab

Sources

Public references, original records, and permission plans used by Seasonal Observatory.

This page records reusable source references and editorial observation methods. Article pages should keep source notes visible to readers, not hidden only in the repository.

International public reference

UNESCO: The Twenty-Four Solar Terms

Public UNESCO reference page; used here as a citation and fact-checking source.

Used for checking the public description of the solar terms as a knowledge system and living practice. This site links to the page rather than copying its text.

View public source

Public meteorological reference

Hong Kong Observatory: The 24 Solar Terms

Public Hong Kong Observatory page; quoted only through source links and short factual attribution.

Used to verify the basic calendar principle that the solar terms are tied to the sun's annual motion and vary slightly by year.

View public source

Original editorial material

Editorial city and home observations

Original Seasonal Observatory editorial writing. Future reader submissions must be permissioned and labeled.

Used for the city walks, balcony notes, indoor-light prompts, food and humidity observations, and page commentary.

View public source
Seasonal Observatory

Original seasonal field notes, source cards, and city-scale observation guides for a long-term solar-terms site.
